tasks.name: Create shared components for admin routes
tasks.description: Implement reusable components needed across all admin routes: DetailLinkButton for linking to existing detail pages and AdminDetailModal for view-only content display.
tasks.notes: These components will be reused across all admin routes to maintain consistency. Follow existing patterns from EditTopicModal.tsx for modal implementation.

relatedFiles.description: New component for linking to detail pages
New component for view-only modal content
Add translations for common button and modal text

tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Create DetailLinkButton component in src/components/admin/ui/DetailLinkButton.tsx:
- Accept props: href, label, disabled, className
- Use Next.js Link component
- Style with Flowbite and Tailwind
- Support RTL layout
- Include eye icon from react-icons/hi

2. Create AdminDetailModal component in src/components/admin/ui/AdminDetailModal.tsx:
- Use Flowbite Modal component
- Accept props: isOpen, onClose, title, children, size
- Support RTL layout
- Include close button
- Style consistently with existing modals

3. Update index.ts in src/components/admin/ui/ to export new components

4. Add translations for common button and modal text in messages/ar.json under a new AdminCommon section
tasks.verificationCriteria:
1. Components render correctly in both LTR and RTL layouts
2. DetailLinkButton correctly navigates to specified routes
3. AdminDetailModal opens and closes properly
4. All text is properly translated in Arabic
5. Components are exported correctly from index.ts
tasks.analysisResult:
This task involves implementing admin routes for the Eventy360 platform following the admin-routes-implementation-plan.md file. The plan includes creating new routes (/users, /events, /submissions, /email-templates, /email-logs) and enhancing existing ones (/verifications, /payments, /topics).

The implementation requires:
1. Creating reusable components (DetailLinkButton and AdminDetailModal)
2. Adding link buttons to existing detail pages for Verifications and Payments
3. Implementing view-only modals for Submissions and Email routes
4. Adding translations to ar.json for each route
5. Ensuring RTL support for Arabic language

The tasks have been split into logical units following the project's existing architecture and patterns. Each task includes detailed implementation guides, related files, dependencies, and verification criteria to ensure consistency and quality.
tasks.summary: Successfully implemented the AdminDetailModal component and DetailLinkButton component for admin routes. The AdminDetailModal provides a reusable modal for displaying details with support for RTL languages, custom sizing, and configurable behavior. The DetailLinkButton component offers a consistent way to link to detail pages. Both components follow project patterns and use Flowbite React components. No translation keys were needed as both components receive pre-translated content through props.

tasks.name: Enhance Verifications route with link buttons
tasks.description: Update the existing Verifications route to add direct link buttons to detail pages from the list view and improve mobile responsiveness.
tasks.notes: Keep the existing detail page implementation. Only modify the list view to use the new DetailLinkButton component.

relatedFiles.description: Update list view to use DetailLinkButton

tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Update src/app/[locale]/admin/(dashboard)/verifications/page.tsx:
- Import DetailLinkButton component
- Replace existing Link/Button in the actions column with DetailLinkButton
- Add translations for the button text
- Improve mobile responsiveness with responsive classes

2. Update translations in messages/ar.json for the AdminVerifications section:
- Add viewDetails translation
- Update any existing translations if needed
tasks.verificationCriteria:
1. DetailLinkButton appears in the actions column
2. Clicking the button navigates to the correct detail page
3. UI is responsive on mobile devices
4. All text is properly translated in Arabic

tasks.summary: Successfully enhanced the Verifications route by replacing the existing button with the DetailLinkButton component. Added the necessary translation for "viewDetails" in Arabic. Improved code by removing unused imports (Button, HiEye, and Link) for better maintainability. The implementation maintains RTL support and ensures consistent UI across the admin interface.
